description:
## Problem
`.github/workflows/ci.yml` only runs `pnpm install`. It has a comment saying "Full gates added after core implementation" — but this means broken code can be merged to main right now. The CI provides zero protection.

## Current State
```yaml
jobs:
  install:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
```

## Fix
Expand the CI workflow to include ALL quality gates immediately. Don't wait for "core implementation." The CI should enforce the quality gates from day one:

```yaml
jobs:
  ci:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - checkout + setup (existing)
      - pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - pnpm run format:check       # prettier
      - pnpm run type-check         # tsc --noEmit  
      - pnpm run lint               # eslint
      - pnpm run build              # tsc + chmod
      - pnpm test                   # vitest run
```

Also add Node.js matrix: `[20, 22]` to verify against both supported versions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- CI runs build, type-check, lint, format:check, and tests on every PR and push to main
- The `.coderabbit.yaml` formatting issue (see related ticket) is fixed so format:check passes
- Matrix covers Node.js 20 and 22
title: CRITICAL: Add build, test, lint, and format-check jobs to CI pipeline

descriptionHistory.description:
## Problem
`.github/workflows/ci.yml` only runs `pnpm install`. It has a comment saying "Full gates added after core implementation" — but this means broken code can be merged to main right now. The CI provides zero protection.

## Current State
```yaml
jobs:
  install:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
```

## Fix
Expand the CI workflow to include ALL quality gates immediately. Don't wait for "core implementation." The CI should enforce the quality gates from day one:

```yaml
jobs:
  ci:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - checkout + setup (existing)
      - pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - pnpm run format:check       # prettier
      - pnpm run type-check         # tsc --noEmit  
      - pnpm run lint               # eslint
      - pnpm run build              # tsc + chmod
      - pnpm test                   # vitest run
```

Also add Node.js matrix: `[20, 22]` to verify against both supported versions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- CI runs build, type-check, lint, format:check, and tests on every PR and push to main
- The `.coderabbit.yaml` formatting issue (see related ticket) is fixed so format:check passes
- Matrix covers Node.js 20 and 22

summary:
## Summary: CI Quality Gates

### Changes Implemented
- Expanded `.github/workflows/ci.yml` from a stub `install` job to a full `ci` job with all quality gates
- Added Node.js matrix strategy covering versions 20 and 22
- Added steps: `format:check`, `type-check`, `lint`, `build`, `test`
- Fixed Prettier formatting in `.coderabbit.yaml` (ran `prettier --write`)
- Added `.claude/` to `.prettierignore` to exclude local Claude settings from format checks

### Files Modified
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — full CI workflow with matrix
- `.coderabbit.yaml` — Prettier formatting fix
- `.prettierignore` — added `.claude/` entry

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- `.claude/settings.local.json` was also failing `format:check`. Added `.claude/` to `.prettierignore` since it's a local dev folder that shouldn't be enforced in CI.

### Learnings
- The `.coderabbit.yaml` Prettier failure was just quote style / trailing newline differences — a simple `prettier --write` fixed it.
- `.claude/` local settings should always be in `.prettierignore` to avoid CI noise.

### Notes for Developer
- All 131 tests pass, build succeeds, format:check passes, type-check and lint clean.
- CI will now enforce all quality gates on every PR and push to main across Node.js 20 and 22.

### Verification Status
- Playwright verification not applicable — this is a CI configuration change with no UI or server endpoints to exercise. Verification performed via direct gate execution: `pnpm run format:check` ✓, `pnpm run build` ✓, `pnpm test` (131/131 pass) ✓.
